summary: Ship-ready code with solid PowerShell conventions, proper error handling, and good CI/CD design. Deductions: (1) MatrixGenerator.ps1 lacks Set-StrictMode -Version Latest (PowerShell best practice). (2) Complex algorithms (Get-CartesianProduct lines 97–115, Invoke-Includes lines 140–175) need more inline comments explaining cartesian expansion and GitHub Actions include semantics. Otherwise excellent: clean modularity (CLI wrapper → library → pure functions), least-privilege workflow permissions, pinned actions, comprehensive test harness with realistic cases, proper stderr/stdout separation in error paths.
